X.description: Lifetime of the first light bulb (in hours), exponentially distributed with λ=0.001.

Y.description: Lifetime of the second light bulb (in hours), exponentially distributed with λ=0.001. Independent of X.

total_lifetime_threshold.description: The threshold (in hours) for the total lifetime of the two bulbs, used to compute P(X+Y ≤ 2000).
